Development dependencies for testing Flask, including Werkzeug, Jinja, MarkupSafe, ItsDangerous, Click, and Blinker.

# Purpose
The file contains a list of URLs pointing to tarball archives of the main branches of several repositories. These repositories are hosted on GitHub and are part of the Pallets project, which includes `werkzeug`, `jinja`, `markupsafe`, `itsdangerous`, `click`, and `blinker`. The URLs are used to download the latest source code for these projects, which may be necessary for building, testing, or deploying software that depends on these libraries.
